title: tragacantha microphysa
intro: Tragacantha microphysa, also known as the small-leaf needle grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Tragacantha microphysa has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in wound healing. Tragacantha microphysa can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although specific preparation methods and dosages may vary depending on the intended use.
